title: Color Theme - Switching theme while Phone is set to Light Theme
scenario: Verify that switching between Follow Phone Theme, Light, and Dark color themes applies immediately, persists across app restarts, and tapping the already-selected theme has no effect.
steps: 1. Ensure phone is set to Light Mode and app theme is at default (Follow Phone Theme).
3. Verify the Dark theme is applied immediately.
4. Check that various screens (e.g., DFU, User Guides, Device settings) display correctly with the Dark theme.
6. Confirm the Dark theme selection persists after restart.
8. Verify the Light theme is applied immediately.
9. Check that various screens (e.g., DFU, User Guides, Device settings) display correctly with the Light theme.
11. Confirm the Light theme selection persists after restart.
12. Change app theme to Follow Phone Theme.
13. Verify the Follow Phone Theme is applied immediately (should match phone's Light Mode).
14. Check that various screens (e.g., DFU, User Guides, Device settings) display correctly with Follow Phone Theme.
16. Confirm the Follow Phone Theme selection persists after restart.
17. Tap the already-selected theme option again.
18. Verify that tapping the already-selected theme does nothing (no change in appearance).
expected: The selected color theme (Dark, Light, or Follow Phone Theme) is applied immediately, displays correctly across all screens (DFU, User Guides, Device settings, etc.), persists after app restart, and tapping the already-selected theme has no effect.
